title: StarCare Health Discovery Meeting Retrospective
content:
Discovery meeting key takeaways:

1. StarCare Health wants to start with a 4-week pilot covering 2 hospitals first, rather than going all-in at once.
2. Success criteria: successfully run through medical record structuring, basic quality control alerts, and weekly report export — three core workflows.
3. Jing Li is responsible for internal project advancement and is more concerned about the timeline and compliance materials; Tao Wang is more concerned about system integration and explicitly stated a preference for HIS read-only API access first.
4. The client's internal security and procurement processes are rigorous — they need to see a security materials package before official launch.
5. We recommend providing a demo using de-identified sample data first to ease their concerns about real data integration.
6. Outstanding issues: have not confirmed who will handle the procurement materials checklist, nor the cadence of weekly check-ins after the pilot kickoff.

title: Sales Daily Quick Notes
content: Followed up with a few customers today. Blue Ocean Retail is still reviewing the pricing; Beichen Logistics has no new progress. Remember to submit the taxi receipt for reimbursement tonight.
